mechanism_narrative: Rising federal funds rates increase borrowing costs and compress equity valuations, generating negative S&P 500 forward returns over the next 20 trading days.
failure_condition: 20-day forward returns show positive mean during rate hikes with p < 0.05.

mechanism_narrative: When the unemployment rate exceeds 5.0 percent, labor market deterioration signals weakening consumer demand, causing negative S&P 500 forward returns over the next 60 trading days.
failure_condition: Forward returns remain positive in > 55% of instances when UNRATE crosses above 5.0.

mechanism_narrative: Simultaneous increases in retail sales and housing starts indicate synchronized consumer and builder confidence, producing positive S&P 500 forward returns over the next 20 trading days.
failure_condition: Joint positive deviations in RSAFS and HOUST yield negative forward returns in > 60% of cases.

mechanism_narrative: Elevated consumer price index readings trigger expectations of central bank intervention, creating short-term buying opportunities that yield positive S&P 500 forward returns over the next 5 trading days.
failure_condition: 5-day forward returns are negative in > 50% of periods when CPIAUCSL exceeds historical thresholds.

mechanism_narrative: Expanding industrial production reflects strengthening corporate output capacity and revenue growth, driving positive S&P 500 forward returns over the next 20 trading days.
failure_condition: Positive INDPRO growth correlates with negative 20-day forward returns in > 55% of observations.

mechanism_narrative: Nonfarm payrolls exceeding 138,000 thousand persons confirm robust employment growth, supporting corporate earnings expectations and generating positive S&P 500 forward returns over the next 60 trading days.
failure_condition: Forward returns are negative in > 60% of months when PAYEMS surpasses the 138,000 threshold.

mechanism_narrative: Rising federal funds rates combined with increasing unemployment indicate a policy-induced economic slowdown, producing negative S&P 500 forward returns over the next 20 trading days.
failure_condition: The joint occurrence of rising FEDFUNDS and UNRATE yields positive forward returns in > 50% of cases.

mechanism_narrative: Quarterly GDP growth above trend levels signals strong aggregate demand, boosting equity valuations and generating positive S&P 500 forward returns over the next 60 trading days.
failure_condition: GDPC1 growth above historical trend correlates with negative 60-day forward returns in > 55% of quarters.
